seo.homeDesc: Book your stay at Illa Pancha, luxury tourist apartments in Ribadeo with sea views.
seo.aptsDesc: Explore our selection of tourist apartments in Ribadeo. Fully equipped and ready for your stay.

about.title: About Us
about.heroDesc: We are a local family with eight apartments facing the Eo estuary. We decided to do without intermediaries to offer you a fair price and direct treatment.
about.storyText1: It all started with a single apartment facing the estuary that my grandfather rehabilitated in the 80s. Over time, the family grew and so did the number of floor. Today there are eight, but the spirit is the same: to offer visitors the same authentic experience we have when we look at the Eo from the window.
about.storyText2: Ribadeo is a special place. The estuary, the international bridge, the lighthouse island, As Catedrais 20 minutes away. The afternoon light in summer painting the waters golden. The octopus 'a feira' in the port stalls. We want you to experience it as we do, and not to cost you an arm and a leg.
about.storyText3: We've been on Booking for years because it gave us visibility. But we got tired of seeing how they charged our guests between 15 and 20% commission. This website is our answer.
about.locationDetail: In the northeastern extreme of Galicia, on the border with Asturias, on the edge of the Eo estuary.
about.ribadeoDesc1: Ribadeo is the gateway to the Galician Green Coast. 20 minutes from the beaches of As Catedrais, 30 from Luarca and 1 hour from Lugo. A perfect starting point for exploring the Mariña lucense.
about.ribadeoDesc2: The historical center, the maritime walk, the yacht club, the viewpoints over the estuary, local markets and the best seafood restaurants in the region are just a few minutes walk away.
about.ctaDesc: Check availability and book directly. No commissions, with personal treatment and the best price guaranteed.
about.expDesc1: Beyond the apartments, Ribadeo offers a unique cultural and gastronomic agenda on the Cantabrian coast.
about.expDesc2: Craft markets, music festivals, hiking through the Mariña lucense or surfing on the best beaches in the north.

contact.title: Contact
contact.desc: Any questions? Contact us. We are here to help you plan your stay in Ribadeo.
contact.heroDesc: Any questions about availability, prices, accessibility or services. We respond in less than 24 hours, normally in a few hours.
contact.sentDesc: We have received your message and will respond shortly to {email}.
contact.formSub: You can also call us directly. We are real people.
contact.placeholderMsg: Tell us what you need: dates, number of people, questions about the apartment...
contact.privacy: By sending this form you accept our privacy policy. Your data will not be shared with third parties.
contact.waMsg: Hi, I would like information about the apartments in Ribadeo.
